hero.title: Experience Namibia Like Never Before
hero.subtitle: Premium tours and transfers showcasing the pristine landscapes and cultural heritage of Namibia

about.title: About Eugene Tours
about.description1: Eugene Tours and Transfers is a premier tour and transfer operator based in Walvis Bay, Namibia. Registered with the Namibia Tourism Board, we pride ourselves on delivering exceptional experiences and professional transportation services throughout Namibia.
about.description2: Our team of experienced guides and drivers are passionate about showcasing the natural beauty, wildlife, and cultural heritage of Namibia to visitors from around the world.
about.description3: Whether you need an airport transfer, cruise excursion, or a comprehensive tour of Namibia's highlights, we offer reliable, comfortable, and personalized services tailored to your needs.
about.officialRecognitionDesc: Proudly registered with the Namibia Tourism Board
about.locationDesc: Park View, Hage Geingob Street, Walvis Bay, Namibia
about.vehicleFleetDesc: Modern, comfortable vehicles for all group sizes
about.fleetDesc: Modern, comfortable vehicles ready for your Namibian adventure

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Experience Namibia with our premium tour and transfer services

airportTransfers.title: Airport Transfers
airportTransfers.description: Professional transfers to/from Windhoek International and Walvisbay International Airport.

cruiseExcursions.title: Cruise Excursions
cruiseExcursions.description: Specialized tours for cruise ship passengers visiting Walvisbay and Swakopmund.

namibiaTours.title: Namibia Tours
namibiaTours.description: Customized tours throughout Namibia showcasing the country's natural beauty and culture.

privateTransfers.title: Private Transfers
privateTransfers.description: Comfortable and reliable private transfers throughout Namibia for individuals and groups.

tourDetails.title: Eugene Tours and Transfers. Namibia Walvisbay Swakopmund Excursions.
tourDetails.subtitle: Day trips for cruise ship passengers.
tourDetails.description: We visit the Walvisbay Lagoon (pelicans and flamingos) – The pink salt lakes – Dune 5 (beer, refreshments, snacks included) – Swakopmund town (2 to 3 hours) – The Moon landscape – Goani Gontes Oasis – The Welwitchia plants – Dune 7 (admission at your own cost)
tourDetails.payment: Payment is made on the tour. Cash payment in Euros or card payment possible.

socialFeedback.title: Guest Feedback
socialFeedback.subtitle: See what our guests have to say about their experiences with Eugene Tours & Transfers on Facebook.
